# GitHub Workflows

## Purpose

This folder defines automated checks for SACA on GitHub Actions.

## What Is Here

- Flutter analyze and test jobs.
- Platform build jobs for supported release targets.
- Dependency or repository maintenance workflows.

## When To Edit This

- Edit these files when validation commands, Flutter versions, or build targets change.
- Keep CI aligned with local commands in the root `README.md`.

## Related Folders

- `test/` contains automated regression coverage.
- `pubspec.yaml` controls Flutter dependencies used by CI.
